hero.title: Valentin Rodin
hero.subtitle: International actor, model, and on-camera talent for film, premium commercials, branded storytelling, and spokesperson work across Asia.

positioning.headline: Mature male international talent with cinematic presence and commercial precision.
positioning.body: Built for premium foreigner roles, strong supporting characters, commercial leads, spokesperson work, and contemporary screen archetypes.

intro_video.headline: Presentation Video
intro_video.body: A dedicated embedded video block must be present on the site for Valentin's personal presentation.

lookbook.headline: Lookbook Direction
lookbook.body: The homepage should feel like a premium actor portfolio rather than a copied PDF. Strong stills and selected acting/editorial images will be imported into this section next.

archetypes.title: Detective
archetypes.summary: Controlled intensity, intelligence, and quiet authority.

archetypes.title: Romantic
archetypes.summary: Warmth, emotional openness, and grounded intimacy.

archetypes.title: Business / Bond
archetypes.summary: Refined confidence, elegance, and strategic charisma.

archetypes.title: Lover
archetypes.summary: Magnetism, vulnerability, and mature masculine softness.

archetypes.title: Macho
archetypes.summary: Force, dominance, danger, and screen-commanding edge.

archetypes.title: Sportsman
archetypes.summary: Athletic confidence, discipline, and active physical presence.

materials.headline: Materials
materials.body: All essential materials are available immediately for casting review.

youtube.headline: YouTube Episodes
youtube.body: The site should include a curated block of selected YouTube episodes plus a direct link to the full channel.

contact.headline: Let’s connect
contact.body: Available for film, series, commercials, branded content, spokesperson, and on-camera work across South Korea and wider Asia.
